plays.summary: It's 34°F at first pitch — cold air kills the ball and generally helps pitchers maintain grip and command. Suppressed run environment. Starters are evenly matched (Casey Mize 3.85 / Joe Ryan 4.03 xFIP), and 13mph wind blowing In from CF tilts under. Model has 7.5, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.5 runs.

It's 43°F at first pitch — cold air kills the ball and generally helps pitchers maintain grip and command. Suppressed run environment. KCR's pen is taxed (17 innings last 2 days), and the park (PF 98) gives pitchers an extra edge. Model has 7.8, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.8 runs.

LAD (117 wRC+) and TOR (106 wRC+) — both lineups grade as above-average run producers. The park (PF 105) is hitter-friendly. 38°F further suppresses scoring pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. Model has 9.9, market is at 8.5 — over by +1.4 runs.

no_plays.summary: The park (PF 104) pushes toward the over while sp_avg counters in the other direction — the model nets out at 9.0 runs with no clear dominant force. Pass.
Model leans under at 7.6 runs but confidence is low without a market line to validate the value. Revisit when odds post.
